mapper.sql: id, category_code, title, summary, content, source_url, source_name, source_publish_date, publisher, last_review_time, target_audience, content_type, is_medical, has_emergency_warning, contraindications, adverse_reactions, verification_status, cover_url, author, view_count, status, publish_time, created_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cms_content ( category_code, title, summary, content, source_url, source_name, source_publish_date, publisher, last_review_time, target_audience, content_type, is_medical, has_emergency_warning, contraindications, adverse_reactions, verification_status, cover_url, author, view_count, status, publish_time, created_by ) VALUES ( #{categoryCode}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{sourceUrl}, #{sourceName}, #{sourcePublishDate}, #{publisher}, #{lastReviewTime}, #{targetAudience}, #{contentType}, #{isMedical}, #{hasEmergencyWarning}, #{contraindications}, #{adverseReactions}, #{verificationStatus}, #{coverUrl}, #{author}, #{viewCount}, #{status}, #{publishTime}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE cms_content
category_code = #{categoryCode},
title = #{title},
summary = #{summary},
content = #{content},
source_url = #{sourceUrl},
source_name = #{sourceName},
source_publish_date = #{sourcePublishDate},
publisher = #{publisher},
last_review_time = #{lastReviewTime},
target_audience = #{targetAudience},
content_type = #{contentType},
is_medical = #{isMedical},
has_emergency_warning = #{hasEmergencyWarning},
contraindications = #{contraindications},
adverse_reactions = #{adverseReactions},
verification_status = #{verificationStatus},
cover_url = #{coverUrl},
author = #{author},
status = #{status},
publish_time = #{publishTime},
id = #{id}
UPDATE cms_content SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
